projects.title: INTELLIX — Real-Time Agentic AI Chat Product
projects.description: A sophisticated full-stack AI ecosystem featuring real-time streaming, automated tool-calling (Web Search/Email), and a robust multi-model failover strategy using Mistral and Gemini.

projects.title: VIZO — Emotion-Based Music Recommendation Product
projects.description: A full-stack AI-powered music platform that detects facial expressions in real time using MediaPipe Vision and recommends songs based on the user’s emotional state.

projects.title: PIXELFLIX — Movie Discovery & Watchlist Product
projects.description: A full-stack movie discovery platform where users can browse movies, manage favorites, maintain watchlists, and track viewing history with role-based authentication and admin dashboard.

projects.title: SOFTWARE HELPER — AI Software Planning Workspace
projects.description: An AI-powered full-stack planning workspace that transforms a problem statement into structured product analysis, system architecture, database design, and final summary outputs.

projects.title: AI DEALER BREAKER — Voice-Powered Negotiation Platform
projects.description: An AI-powered shopping negotiation app where users join live voice sessions, compete for best deals, and track outcomes on a real-time leaderboard.

projects.title: AI BATTLE AREANA — Multi-Model Battle App
projects.description: A full-stack LangGraph arena where two model-generated solutions compete side-by-side and a judge model scores both with reasoning.
